context: Tests whether the agent distinguishes read-only status from Liquid Glass toolbar controls.

checklist.name: Status classification
checklist.description: Classifies the leading count as read-only status rather than a toolbar command or standalone action.

checklist.name: Toolbar boundary
checklist.description: Recommends moving the count out of a toolbar/control slot unless a real action is added.

checklist.name: No false affordance
checklist.description: Avoids Button, NavigationLink, gestures, or interactive Liquid Glass treatment for the read-only count.

checklist.name: Accessibility semantics
checklist.description: Provides status-style accessibility labeling or values without exposing button semantics for the count.

checklist.name: Verification
checklist.description: Calls for visual or UI automation verification that the count does not react as a tappable target.
